additional_description: To get prices for specific dates (e.g., 2024-01-31 and 2025-07-31), use two small date ranges around each date (e.g., 2024-01-30 to 2024-02-01 and 2025-07-30 to 2025-08-01) instead of one long range, reducing data fetched and improving performance.

To get prices for specific dates (e.g., 2024-01-31 and 2025-07-31), use two small date ranges around each date (e.g., 2024-01-30 to 2024-02-01 and 2025-07-30 to 2025-08-01) instead of one long range, reducing data fetched and improving performance.
